articles.title: Huma: 'Aishwarya made film festivals so important'
articles.description: Huma Qureshi graced the Cannes Film Festival, attending the Women in Cinema gala and making striking red carpet appearances. Reflecting on her journey, she credited Aishwarya Rai Bachchan for inspiring her Cannes dreams and her own elegant saree look as a homage. Qureshi emphasized the crucial role of film festivals in showcasing nuanced global cinema amidst algorithmic trends.

articles.title: Karuppu Box Office Collection Live Day 3: Suriya, Trisha Krishnan Earns Over Rs 120 Crore Globally
articles.description: Suriya and Trisha Krishnan's Karuppu arrived in theatres on May 15. Directed by RJ Balaji, the film was originally scheduled for a big-screen release on May 14. However, due to unforeseen circumstances, the movie's release was delayed by a day. Produced by Dream Warrior Pictures, the action drama locked horns with Pati Patni Aur Woh Do at the box office. Despite a clash, the film has managed to earn well at the ticket window. In just three days of theatrical run, the movie has raced past the Rs 60 crore mark in India. Karuppu star cast The star cast of RJ Balaji's Karuppu features Suriya as Karuppuswamy, Saravanan, and Trisha as lawyer Preethi. Singer Chinmayi Sripada has dubbed for the actress in Karuppu. Besides the lead star cast, RJ Balaji plays the role of antagonist Baby Kannan. Indrans, Natty Subramaniam, Supreeth Reddy, Deepa Shankar, Lollu Sabha Maaran, and others are an integral part of the movie. Karuppu box office report Meanwhile, Karuppu registered a good box office opening of Rs 15.5 crore with 4,891 shows. Later, on day two, the film minted Rs 24.15 crore, followed by Rs 28.35 crore in India. The film is now all set to cross the Rs 70 crore mark at the domestic box office.

articles.title: Thought of the day inspired by the Bhagavad Gita: Peace comes when expectations fade
articles.description: People often tie their happiness to expectations and immediate results. The world today is driven by readily available facilities, like getting instant house help through online platforms, gig workers delivering deliverables just in time, and so on!Hence, we often expect immediate success in our careers, appreciation from others, quick results from hard work, and constant happiness in relationships. But when these expectations are not fulfilled, disappointment, stress, and frustration slowly take over our minds. This emotional pressure has become common in modern life, especially in a time when social media constantly shows perfect lifestyles and achievements.The teachings of the Bhagavad Gita remind us that true peace does not come from controlling every outcome. Instead, peace comes from learning how to stay calm and balanced, even when life does not go according to plan. One of the deepest messages of the Gita is to focus on our actions and efforts rather than becoming attached to results.

articles.title: Who is Jinnytty? South Korean Twitch streamer leaves fans horrified after late-night hotel stalker scare
articles.description: South Korean Twitch streamer Jinnytty sparked global concern after livestreaming a terrifying ordeal from a hotel in Poland during her Wobblethon cycling challenge. The streamer allegedly barricaded herself inside her room after a stalker tracked her location and attempted to approach her hotel. Fans praised her bravery and Polish streamer Mokrysuchar’s quick response. The incident also reignited major discussions online about streamer safety, privacy risks, and dangers faced by female creators during real-time broadcasts.

articles.title: “Numbers don’t lie, but feelings do”: Cardi B dragged online as fans compare Stefon Diggs’ net worth to Offset’s
articles.description: Cardi B and Stefon Diggs sparked major online debate after viral rumors claimed the rapper may have forgiven the NFL star despite cheating allegations. Social media users began comparing Diggs’ reported net worth to Offset’s, with some accusing Cardi of treating the two men differently because of money. Critics labeled her a “gold digger,” while others defended her, arguing that relationships are more complex than internet speculation and financial comparisons.

Cody Johnson took home Entertainer of the Year and Male Artist of the Year, capping off a night of significant country music achievements.

articles.title: "How low is her self esteem": Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce accused of chasing attention after repeated NYC sightings
articles.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce sparked massive online debate after being spotted together for a second straight night in New York City. While many fans praised the couple’s chemistry, style, and public affection, others accused them of chasing attention with repeated public outings. Social media reactions ranged from supportive comments calling them “absolutely gorgeous humans” to harsh criticism labeling the appearances “PR walks.” Kelce’s outfit also became a viral talking point online.

Despite the debate, MrBeast remains YouTube’s most-followed individual creator, and his recent videos still attract tens of millions of viewers quickly.
